subject: Guard coord_service imports and remove sys.path manipulation
description: Remove sys.path.insert() from deployer.py, cli.py, config_loader.py. Guard all coord_service imports with try/except ImportError. Declare as optional dependency in pyproject.toml[extras].

subject: Add async agent execution path with jittered retry
description: Add async def aexecute() to StandardAgent using asyncio.sleep() for retries with jittered backoff. Prevents thread pool starvation during parallel agent execution.

subject: Add tests for untested observability modules (alerting, merit_score_service, decision_tracker, aggregation)
description: Create test files for 4 observability modules with zero coverage. Priority: alerting.py (HALT_WORKFLOW can silently fail) and merit_score_service.py (has latent data corruption bug D-01).

subject: Add tests for CLI rollback and detail_report
description: Create tests/test_cli/test_rollback.py using Click CliRunner. rollback.py is safety-critical (executes state changes). detail_report.py is user-facing.

subject: Add tests for security_limits.py constants
description: Create tests/test_compiler/test_security_limits.py verifying each limit constant and behavior when exceeded. These are the only defense against memory exhaustion and billion laughs attacks.

subject: Fix buffer _flush_unsafe to use swap-and-flush pattern
description: Refactor _flush_unsafe() in buffer.py to swap buffers under lock then flush outside lock, matching the pattern already used in flush(). Prevents all-agent stall during DB writes.

subject: Change safety validation to fail-closed in StandardAgent
description: At standard_agent.py:333-334, change except Exception handler from log-and-continue to fail-closed (block LLM call). Also unify exception hierarchy: make SecurityError inherit FrameworkException.

subject: Fix asyncio.Lock TOCTOU race in FailoverProvider
description: Initialize asyncio.Lock eagerly in __init__ instead of lazy creation in _get_async_state_lock(). Python 3.10+ allows asyncio.Lock creation outside event loop.

subject: Add LRU eviction to shared circuit breaker dict
description: Add LRU eviction or WeakValueDictionary to BaseLLM._circuit_breakers. Grows unboundedly in long-running services with many models/endpoints.

subject: Fix merit score columns for mixed outcomes
description: Either change successful_decisions/failed_decisions to float (with Alembic migration) or add separate mixed_decisions counter. Currently float 0.5 increment on int columns silently truncates.
agreement: consensus (downgraded from CRITICAL - currently dead code path)

subject: Consolidate duplicate WorkflowStateDict definitions
description: Merge the two WorkflowStateDict TypedDicts (state_manager.py:19 with 15 keys and executors/base.py:20 with 11 keys) into a single canonical definition. Include all fields from both.

subject: Add missing Alembic migrations for 7+ tables
description: Run alembic revision --autogenerate to capture experimentation and M5 tables missing from migrations. Choose single DDL strategy (Alembic vs create_all).

subject: Add ON DELETE CASCADE to experimentation and M5 foreign keys
description: Change FK fields to explicit sa_column=Column(String, ForeignKey('...', ondelete='CASCADE')) in experimentation/models.py and self_improvement/storage/experiment_models.py.
